jd_text:
Job Title: AI Product Engineer — CEO's Office
Company: Nicobar Design Pvt. Ltd. (nicobar.com)
Location: Delhi
Experience: 3-5 years

THE OPPORTUNITY
We've spent a decade building a brand that looks and feels unmistakably Nicobar. The next chapter is building a company that thinks the same way — every store, every collection, every customer conversation: sharper, faster, unmistakably ours. AI-native, not in theory, but in every room we walk into.

WHAT YOU'LL OWN
01 Customer Personalization : Build the intelligence layer beneath all our customer communication that understands who each customer actually is.
02 Store Clienteling : Build the clienteling tool our store teams reach for every day.
03 Business Intelligence : Replace Microsoft BI dashboards with a live, conversational intelligence layer.
04 Smoothen Design Workstreams : Remove friction so the creative team can make more, better, faster.

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
Engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent with 3-5 years of experience.
You've built something real with an LLM API - OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.
Fluent in Python/ NodeJS. Comfortable writing and querying SQL.
Ability to build front-ends that don't embarrass the brand. We're visual people.
master_cv:
# Fresher Profile: Priya Sharma

## Profile
Recent Computer Science graduate with a passion for Machine Learning and Data Science.

## Education
B.Tech Computer Science — IIT Delhi (2020 - 2024)
- GPA: 9.2/10

## Skills
- Python, R, SQL
- TensorFlow, PyTorch
- Data Visualization (Tableau)

## Projects

### Sentiment Analysis Bot
- Built a Twitter sentiment analyzer using BERT. [Source Code](https://github.com/priya/bert-bot)

### Portfolio Website
- Designed a personal portfolio using React and Tailwind. [Live Demo](https://priya.dev)

## Internships

### Data Science Intern — Fintech Corp (Summer 2023)
- Analyzed loan default patterns using logistic regression.

## Outreach Preferences (PRIVATE)
- Prefer email over LinkedIn DMs
- Internal Note: Very interested in healthcare AI

company_intelligence.brand_identity: Contemporary Indian design, minimalistic, nature-inspired aesthetics
company_intelligence.business_model: Direct-to-consumer (D2C) omnichannel retail with physical stores and e-commerce
company_intelligence.online_presence: nicobar.com, active on Instagram, Facebook, Pinterest
company_intelligence.store_count: Approximately 15-20 stores across major Indian cities (Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, etc.)
company_intelligence.key_differentiator: Unique design language blending Indian craftsmanship with modern minimalism
company_intelligence.technology_adoption: Currently uses Microsoft BI for business intelligence; seeking AI-native transformation
company_intelligence.recent_developments: Expanding product lines and store network; investing in AI and personalization
company_intelligence.competitors: FabIndia, Anokhi, Chumbak, Tata CLiQ Luxury, niche Indian lifestyle brands

must_haves: Engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent
Built something real with an LLM API (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.)
Ability to build front-ends that are visually appealing
nice_to_haves: Experience with retail or e-commerce domain
Knowledge of clienteling or CRM tools
hidden_expectations: Ability to work directly with the CEO's office and influence strategy
Comfortable in a design-driven, brand-focused culture
Self-starter who can own projects end-to-end
Strong aesthetic sense and attention to visual detail
Ability to communicate with non-technical stakeholders (designers, store teams)
day_one_deliverables: Assess current tech stack and data infrastructure
Identify quick wins for AI integration in customer communication
Propose a roadmap for replacing Microsoft BI with conversational intelligence
Start building a prototype for store clienteling tool
disqualifiers: No engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent
No hands-on experience with LLM APIs
No proficiency in Python or NodeJS

user_truth.summary: Candidate is a recent graduate (B.Tech 2024) with no full-time work experience. Education from IIT Delhi satisfies the degree requirement. Has Python, SQL, and some ML project experience but lacks professional experience (3-5 years required) and explicit LLM API usage. No front-end building evidence. Does not meet seniority or experience disqualifiers.
disqualifiers_triggered: No hands-on experience with LLM APIs

positioning_strategy.angle: Emphasize raw potential, IIT pedigree, and rapid learning ability to compensate for lack of experience. Position as a fresh perspective that can grow with the company's AI transformation.
positioning_strategy.narrative: The candidate is a recent IIT Delhi graduate with strong Python and SQL skills, and a foundation in ML projects. While lacking the required 3-5 years experience and explicit LLM API usage, the candidate can be positioned as a high-potential hire who can quickly upskill and bring fresh thinking to Nicobar's AI initiatives. The strategy is to appeal to Nicobar's design-driven, innovative culture by highlighting the candidate's ability to learn fast, adapt, and contribute to early-stage prototyping under mentorship. The risk is mitigated by the candidate's top-tier engineering background and the company's need for AI-native talent.

application_pack.resume_markdown:

B.Tech Computer Science — IIT Delhi (2020 - 2024)

- GPA: 9.2/10

## Skills

- Python, R, SQL
- TensorFlow, PyTorch
- Data Visualization (Tableau)

## Projects



## Sentiment Analysis Bot

- Built a Twitter sentiment analyzer using BERT, demonstrating ability to work with transformer models. [Source Code](https://github.com/priya/bert-bot)

## Portfolio Website

- Designed a personal portfolio using React and Tailwind, showcasing front-end development skills. [Live Demo](https://priya.dev)

## Internships



## Data Science Intern — Fintech Corp (Summer 2023)

- Analyzed loan default patterns using logistic regression, gaining experience in data analysis and predictive modeling.
application_pack.cover_note: As an IIT Delhi graduate with strong Python and SQL skills, I have built ML projects from scratch and can quickly master LLM APIs. I offer a fresh perspective and rapid learning to drive Nicobar's AI transformation.
application_pack.recruiter_message: I'm excited about the AI Product Engineer role at Nicobar Design, where I can apply my IIT Delhi engineering background to drive AI innovation in design. While I may lack the 3-5 years experience, my rapid learning ability and strong Python/ML foundation make me a high-potential fit for your AI transformation.
